snippet.description:

Executive Producer = Adib Hamdi (XO House)
Creative Director = Alia Elena (XO House)

Composer = Ikhwan Fatanna, Wan Saleh
Lyricist = Ikhwan Fatanna, Amir Firdaus
Music producer = Wan Saleh
Arranger = Wan Saleh
Mix & Master = Wan Saleh

Director = Atixxe (XO House) + Adib Hamdi (XO House)

DOP = Ju
Editor + Colorist = Atixxe (XO House)

Extras: Saifful, Suzana, Amynanie

LYRICS

Verse
Syawal dah menjelang tiba
Tapi aku masih seorang saja
Bukannya tergesa-gesa
Cuma hati ingin rasa dicinta

Prechorus
Merayakan hari raya
Bersama insan tercinta
Yang penting nilai agama pada dirinya

Chorus
Jemput-jemput datang rumahku
Singgahlah dulu jumpa orang tuaku
Jemput-jemput janganlah malu
Cari-carikan calon menantu

Jemput-jemput datang rumahku
Singgahlah dulu jumpa orang tuaku
Jemput-jemput janganlah malu
Cari-carikan calon menantu

Verse 2
Bukan pada zahir rupa,
Yang terutama nilai pekertinya.
Jalinan yang ’kan tercipta,
Moga Yang Esa sudi menerima.

Lirik 'Yeye Raya' - Floor 88 & Odda

(Intro)
(Verse 1)
Di rumah sebelah ada jiran macam naga
Asal nampak nak bertengkar buat aku sakit kepala
Sedap betul mulut dia senang senang panggil kita naga
Dua kali lima takut takut terkahwin pula
Tak kuasa aku,bukan dia taste saya
Jangan cakap besar takut takut terjatuh cinta

(Verse 2)
Esok dah nak raya baik buat kuih raya
Baju raya dah siap tempah, tak sabarnya nak beraya
Duit raya pun dah tukar, semangat nya nak beraya
Esok ronda-ronda boleh kita cuci mata
Semua sudah sedia elok kita tidur saja
Jangan jadi orang sebelah solat raya pun membuta
Eh dia tak puas hati apa dia sakit hati sebab tahun lepas punya baju raya sama colour dengan langsir

(Chorus)
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita semua bergembira, (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa

(Verse 3)
Perut aku pun dah kenyang, habis makan ketupat dan rendang
Tiba tiba sedara datang, minta tolong hantarkan lemang
Kenapa raya pertama,waktu ini nak rosak pula
Nak mintak tolong,tolong,tolong pada siapa
Sedihnya aku rasa beginikah kisahnya
Kenapalah raya pertama
Nasib malang bertimpa timpa

(Verse 4)
Alamak ada perempuan, dok termenung di tepi jalan
Rupa rupa jiran sebelah, sakit hati malas nak layan
Tak sampai pula hati ini,nak tinggal dia kesorangan
Awak nak pergi mana mari abang hantarkan
Malu ku selama ini,hari hari gaduh dengannya
Eh kenapa hati ini, terasa berbunga bunga
Jemputlah malam nanti, ajaklah teman temanmu
Datang beraya rumah ku,bersama ayah dan ibu

(Chorus)
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna
Raya mari kita semua bergembira,
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita semua bergembira, (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa

(Outro)
Dengan teman,ibu bapa sanak saudara
Minta ampun kemaafan sesama kita
Selamat Hari Raya

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:

Art Director: Léa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo

Background Designer: Léa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go
2D Animation Timer: Park Dae Yeol, Jo Ahra

Lyrics - Inikan Hari Raya

[Verse 1]
Bila hari raya,
Janganlah tamak haloba,
Dalam bergembira,
Biarlah berpada.

[Pre-chorus]
Oh tak kesah,
Baju lama,
Asalkan masih boleh beraya,
Bersyukur sentiasa.

[Chorus]
Salam lebaran pada semua,
Dengan senyuman dan juga tawa,
Meriahkan suasana,
Inikan hari raya.

Raikan dengan sanak saudara,
Yang berkunjung datang tak dilupa,
Penuh riang gembira,
Indahnya hari raya.

[Verse 2]
Oh sudah tiba,
Hari yang dinanti,
Confirm riuh semua kumpul sekali.

Makcik yang belah sana,
Sepupu yang belah sini,
Pak long pak ngah pun ada,
Eh memang kecoh sekali.

Beraya hujung ke hujung kampung,
Semua rumah kalau boleh memang nak dikunjung,
Yang tampan dan segak datang berbaju melayu,
Yang cantik pula berbaju kurung.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I can’t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide 🚀 https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER REACTION!! Punisher | Scorpion | Marvel Studios
snippet.description:
ORGANIC WEBBING?! Greg Alba, Coy Jandreau, & John Humphrey react to the first official trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day starring Tom Holland as Peter Parker, with returning appearances from Zendaya as MJ, Jacob Batalon as Ned, Jon Bernthal as The Punisher, Mark Ruffalo as Bruce Banner, and Michael Mando as Scorpion. The trailer teases a darker, more emotional story for Peter after the events of No Way Home, while also hinting at a mysterious mutation storyline and a dangerous new wave of crime in New York.
This first look also has fans speculating hard about some possible new faces and identities, including Sadie Sink’s mysterious role, with many theories pointing toward Jean Grey, while Tramell Tillman is widely rumored to be connected to Damage Control. Viewers are also already buzzing over possible appearances from characters like Boomerang and Tarantula, on top of the more clearly revealed street-level chaos surrounding Spider-Man, Punisher, and Scorpion. At the time of writing, those rumored identities and character spots remain unconfirmed by official reporting, so we’re reacting to both what’s shown and what fans are piecing together.
With Destin Daniel Cretton directing, Spider-Man: Brand New Day is shaping up to be one of the most talked-about Marvel movies of 2026.

localized.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER REACTION!! Punisher | Scorpion | Marvel Studios
localized.description:
ORGANIC WEBBING?! Greg Alba, Coy Jandreau, & John Humphrey react to the first official trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day starring Tom Holland as Peter Parker, with returning appearances from Zendaya as MJ, Jacob Batalon as Ned, Jon Bernthal as The Punisher, Mark Ruffalo as Bruce Banner, and Michael Mando as Scorpion. The trailer teases a darker, more emotional story for Peter after the events of No Way Home, while also hinting at a mysterious mutation storyline and a dangerous new wave of crime in New York.
This first look also has fans speculating hard about some possible new faces and identities, including Sadie Sink’s mysterious role, with many theories pointing toward Jean Grey, while Tramell Tillman is widely rumored to be connected to Damage Control. Viewers are also already buzzing over possible appearances from characters like Boomerang and Tarantula, on top of the more clearly revealed street-level chaos surrounding Spider-Man, Punisher, and Scorpion. At the time of writing, those rumored identities and character spots remain unconfirmed by official reporting, so we’re reacting to both what’s shown and what fans are piecing together.
With Destin Daniel Cretton directing, Spider-Man: Brand New Day is shaping up to be one of the most talked-about Marvel movies of 2026.
